LAW AND MOTION, 301, JUDGE BUSCH MADE A DISCLOSURE ABOUT HIS WIFE, CATHARINE BARNES, A DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY NOT INVOLVED IN THIS CASE AND THAT HE DOES NOT VIEW HER EMPLOYMENT AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL. HE ALSO DISCLOSED ABOUT ELIZABETH SALVESON WHOSE NAME APPEARS ON THE PLEADING IS A FORMER PARTNER AT HOWARD & RICE AND A FAMILY FRIEND AND ALSO ABOUT MS. ROCCANOVA IS ALSO A FORMER ASSOCIATE OF HOWARD & RICE FIRM. NO OBJECTIONS WERE MADE. PETITIONER SERVICE EMPLOYEES INTERNATIONAL UNION, LOCAL 1021'S PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION. ARGUED. PETITIONER SERVICE EMPLOYEES INTERNATIONAL UNION, LOCAL 1021'S PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION IS DENIED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189
